arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “At the Bernabéu anything can happen”
arts.sum: “It was entertaining, we achieved our goal of being in the final and there is not much time to think about it. Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke after the dramatic 4-4 draw with Real Sociedad to explain that he always kept faith in his players, saying, “I never thought we were going out.

arts.ttl: Endrick: "I'm very pleased with my goal and to help the team"
arts.sum: “I'm here to help by scoring goals or defending and winning trophies. The forward gave his impressions on Realmadrid TV about a dramatic tie that secured a place in the final of the Copa: “I love experiencing this madness, even though I like to win as soon as possible and celebrate with the fans and the bench.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 4-4 Real Sociedad (agg 5-4): Los Blancos overturn two-goal deficit to reach Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Real Madrid, will play either Barcelona or Atletico Madrid in next month’s Copa del Rey final in Seville next month

arts.ttl: Real Madrid (5)4-4(4) Real Sociedad: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Los Blancos survive major scare to reach Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Real Madrid survive a major scare to seal their place in the Copa del Rey final with a dramatic 5-4 aggregate victory over Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid needs extra time to oust Real Sociedad and advance to Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Madrid had won the first leg 1-0 in February, but Sociedad took the second leg 4-3 after Mikel Oyarzabal scored in stoppage time in regulation, when both teams scored twice after the 80th minute. Real Madrid needed extra time to get past Real Sociedad and reach its second Copa del Rey final in three seasons on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta gives Gabriel and Jurrien Timber injury updates after double scare ahead of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal face a nervous wait to assess injuries to Gabriel and Jurrien Timber, after the pair were forced off against Fulham.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fans take aim at Carlo Ancelotti for decision during Real Sociedad meeting

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star targeted with boos by club’s fans during Real Sociedad clash
